message:
test: add tests for tunnel URL extraction, glob matching, rsync, and VAAPI scaling

- tunnel.zig: 16 tests for extractCloudflareUrl, extractNgrokUrl,
  extractJsonField, extractTailscaleUrl
- transfer.zig: 30 tests for matchGlob, containsGlobChars,
  containsDoublestar, splitGlobPath, matchGlobPath, computeBlockSize,
  RollingChecksum (compute, hash, roll)
- video_encoder_linux.zig: 4 tests for calcAlignedDimensions
  (alignment, dimension cap, pixel budget, small input)
